name: Command & Control Detection Response
description: Responds to suspected command-and-control (C2) activity detected on the network. Riggs AI analyzes the alert using the C2 detection template to confirm beaconing or C2 communication. Confirmed threats trigger host isolation via EDR, firewall blocking of the C2 infrastructure, threat intel EDL updates, a lateral movement sweep across the environment, P1 incident ticket creation, and IR team notification. Unconfirmed alerts are downgraded to low severity for continued monitoring.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
required_integrations.reason: Isolate compromised endpoints communicating with C2 infrastructure

required_integrations.name: Palo Alto NGFW
required_integrations.reason: Block C2 IP addresses and domains at the network perimeter

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create P1 incident ticket for IR team tracking and compliance

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the incident response team of confirmed C2 activity

config.description: Triggers on network alerts indicating potential command-and-control communication or beaconing behavior

config.additional_instructions: Focus on beaconing interval regularity, destination reputation, protocol anomalies, and process attribution. Determine if this is confirmed C2 or legitimate traffic.
config.description: AI-powered analysis using the c2_detection template to evaluate destination reputation, beaconing patterns, protocol abuse, and process attribution
Routes based on whether Riggs AI confirmed command-and-control communication

parameters.comment: Isolated due to confirmed C2 communication — Alert: {{trigger_1.alert.alert_id}}

config.description: Network-isolates the compromised endpoint via CrowdStrike to sever C2 communication immediately
Blocks the C2 destination IP and domain on the Palo Alto NGFW to prevent any other hosts from reaching the same infrastructure
Adds confirmed C2 IPs and domains to the threat intelligence EDL for organization-wide blocking

config.additional_instructions: Check for other hosts communicating with the same C2 infrastructure ({{trigger_1.alert.destination_ip}} / {{trigger_1.alert.destination_domain}}). Identify any additional compromised endpoints.
config.description: AI-powered lateral movement analysis to identify other hosts in the environment that may be communicating with the same C2 infrastructure
Creates a Priority 1 incident ticket in Jira with full C2 analysis, containment actions taken, and lateral movement sweep results
Sends a critical priority notification to the IR team Slack channel with the full incident summary and containment status

parameters.note: C2 analysis by Riggs AI returned verdict: {{analyze_1.verdict}}. No confirmed C2 indicators. Downgrading to low severity for monitoring.

config.description: Downgrades alert severity to low when C2 activity is not confirmed, keeping the alert open for continued observation
Command and control detection response workflow complete
